member.name: T:Origam.Schema.AbstractSchemaItem
member.summary: This class makes a persistable base for any schema items. It has a special override for Key, it uses a ModelElementKey, which has strongly typed accessors to the primary key of any class that is contained under schema versions.

member.name: M:Origam.Schema.AbstractSchemaItem.SetExtensionRecursive(Origam.Schema.Package)
member.summary: Recursively changes extension on all child items of the provided schema item.

member.name: M:Origam.Schema.AbstractSchemaItem.Persist
member.summary:
Overriden member from AbstractPersistent. When the item is derived from another item, we cannot save it.
We also persist all child items when persisting this one.

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.AbstractSchemaItem.NameableTypes
member.summary: By default all NewItemTypes are nameable. Override if only a subset of types can be populated with NewTypeNames.

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.AbstractSchemaItemProvider.NameableTypes
member.summary: By default all NewItemTypes are nameable. Override if only a subset of types can be populated with NewTypeNames.

member.name: T:Origam.Schema.SchemaItemDescriptionAttribute
member.summary: Use this attribute to specify a name and folder name of the schema item.

member.name: T:Origam.Schema.Feature
member.summary: Summary description for Feature.

member.name: T:Origam.Schema.ICaptionSchemaItem
member.summary: Summary description for ICaptionSchemaItem.

member.name: T:Origam.Schema.IOrigamMetadataConsumer
member.summary: Summary description for IOrigamMetadataConsumer.

member.name: T:Origam.Schema.IQueryLocalizable
member.summary: Summary description for IQueryLocalizable.

member.name: T:Origam.Schema.ISchemaItem
member.summary: Summary description for SchemaItem.

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.ISchemaItem.Package
member.summary: Gets or sets the schema extensions, under which this item was defined.

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.ISchemaItem.ParentItem
member.summary: Gets or sets the parent schema item.

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.ISchemaItem.RootItem
member.summary: Gets the root schema item.

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.ISchemaItem.Group
member.summary: Gets or sets the group where this item is located.

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.ISchemaItem.DerivedFrom
member.summary: Gets or sets the item from which this item has been derived

member.name: T:Origam.Schema.ISchemaItemFactory
member.summary: Provides interface for generating new schema items.

member.name: M:Origam.Schema.ISchemaItemFactory.NewItem``1(System.Guid,Origam.Schema.SchemaItemGroup)
member.summary: Provides a new item of a given type.

member.name: M:Origam.Schema.ISchemaItemFactory.NewGroup(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Returns new valid group for this item.

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.ISchemaItemFactory.NewItemTypes
member.summary: Gets all possible schema item types that can be asked for with NewItem method.

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.ISchemaItemFactory.NewTypeNames
member.summary: Gets optional list of names for new item types. This list will be used to generate a submenu for New > [Type] > [Name1] [Name2] ...

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.ISchemaItemFactory.NameableTypes
member.summary: Lists types for which the NewTypeNames can be used since not all NewItemTypes might need to be populated by predefined names.

member.name: T:Origam.Schema.ISchemaItemProvider
member.summary: Root of different types of schema items (e.g. Form provider, Entity provider, Roles provider).

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.ISchemaItemProvider.ChildItems
member.summary: Gets all schema items.

member.name: T:Origam.Schema.Package
member.summary: Summary description for Schema.

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.Package.VersionString
member.summary: Gets or sets the version of this schema extension.

member.name: T:Origam.Schema.PackageReference
member.summary: Summary description for Schema.

member.name: T:Origam.Schema.ParameterReference
member.summary: Summary description for ParameterReference.

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.SchemaItemAncestorCollection.Item(System.Int32)

summary.para: Represents the entry at the specified index of the .

param.name: index
param.para: The zero-based index of the entry to locate in the collection.

value.para: The entry at the specified index of the collection.

member.exception: is outside the valid range of indexes for the collection.
